ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock (to account for stock splits, dividends, etc.) */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "clase" INTEGER /* Closing indicator (0 for no special closure, 1 for special closure) */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ticker */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data */,
  "data_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the stock price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickers" (
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock ticker */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the ticker is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Security Identification Procedures number */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date */,
  "delisted_date" TEXT /* Delisting date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock ticker being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Device type (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Browser type (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio that the holding belongs to */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock ticker being held */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares held */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the shares were purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were purchased */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the holding was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the holding was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio that the trade belongs to */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock ticker being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade was made */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were traded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytical_data" (
  "analytical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytical data point */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock ticker being analyzed */,
  "moving_average_50" REAL /* 50-day moving average */,
  "moving_average_200" REAL /* 200-day moving average */,
  "relative_strength_index" REAL /* Relative strength index */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytical data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytical data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytical_data_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock ticker related to the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the economic indicator was published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the economic indicator was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the economic indicator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
